query: Meta WhatsApp Meta AI incognito conversations launch Facebook Search AI Mode rollout details

mako.raw:
{"query":"Meta WhatsApp Meta AI incognito conversations launch Facebook Search AI Mode rollout details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1890,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/13/whatsapp-adds-an-incognito-mode-in-meta-ai-chats/","title":"WhatsApp adds an incognito mode in Meta AI chats | TechCrunch","content":"Incognito chats will roll out to WhatsApp and the Meta AI app over the next few months.
“People are starting to use AI for everything, including some of their most private thoughts, whether that’s tackling financial or health questions, or for advice on how to respond to a tricky message from a friend or a colleague.
We think it’s really important to give people the ability to ask these questions as privately as possible,” Alice Newton-Rex, VP of Product at WhatsApp, told TechCrunch over a call.
Newton-Rex said Meta used smaller models to power its previous features, but the new incognito chat uses its latest Muse Spark model, which was released last month.
The company is already working on its next feature that taps its private processing infrastructure.
ChatGPT and Claude offer incognito modes, too, and companies like DuckDuckGo and Proton have launched their own privacy-first chatbots.
Last month, Reuters cited lawyers who opined that users’ conversations with an AI chatbot could be used against them in litigation."},{"url":"https://eastleighvoice.co.ke/news/350054/whatsapp-adds-incognito-mode-for-meta-ai-chats","title":"WhatsApp adds incognito mode for Meta AI chats | The Eastleigh Voice","content":"WhatsApp on Wednesday announced it is introducing a new “Incognito Chat” feature for conversations with Meta AI, giving users a more private way to interact with artificial intelligence directly inside the messaging platform.
Technology companies, including Meta, OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic, have faced growing scrutiny over how user AI conversations are stored and used.
Meta has not yet confirmed the exact global rollout timeline, but the feature is expected to be gradually rolled out for WhatsApp and Meta AI users worldwide over the coming months.
Forbes global rich list (2026)
Explainer: Why the 2026 FIFA World Cup ball comes with battery that needs charging before every match"},{"url":"https://www.newswire.lk/2026/05/13/meta-announces-major-new-feature-for-whatsapp/","title":"Meta announces major new feature for WhatsApp - Newswire","content":"Meta Newsroom announced the launch of “Incognito Chat” with Meta AI on WhatsApp and the Meta AI app, introducing what the company describes as a completely private way to interact with artificial intelligence.
According to Meta, the new feature is built on WhatsApp’s “Private Processing” technology and is designed to ensure that conversations remain invisible to everyone, including Meta itself.
The feature will reportedly allow users to receive private AI assistance related to ongoing WhatsApp conversations without interrupting the main chat."},{"url":"https://tech.yahoo.com/articles/meta-launches-incognito-ai-chat-152421580.html","title":"Meta launches incognito AI chat mode on WhatsApp","content":"Both rollouts are expected to complete over the coming months, the company said.
Image uploads are not supported at launch, WhatsApp head Will Cathcart noted in comments reported by Reuters, with the tool currently limited to text exchanges only.
Earlier private processing features, including AI-generated message summaries, ran on more compact models; Newton-Rex told TechCrunch that incognito chat instead draws on the Llama Spark model Meta released last month.
A new feature called Side Chat will let users privately access the AI assistant from any WhatsApp conversation."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Meta WhatsApp Meta AI incognito conversations launch Facebook Search AI Mode rollout details","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://about.fb.com/news/2026/05/incognito-chat-whatsapp-meta-ai","title":"Introducing a Completely Private Way to Chat With AI","content":"# Introducing a Completely Private Way to Chat With AI. * We’re launching Incognito Chat with Meta AI on WhatsApp and the Meta AI app, a completely private way to interact with AI. * Your Incognito Chat conversations are processed in a secure environment that even Meta can’t see, and disappear by default. Today, we’re launching Incognito Chat with Meta AI on WhatsApp and the Meta AI app, a new way to have completely private conversations with AI. We believe this private way of chatting has potential to be part of several ways people chat with AI on WhatsApp. In the coming months, we’ll also introduce Sidechat protected by Private Processing on WhatsApp. Side Chat with Meta AI will give you private help with any WhatsApp chat with context of what’s being discussed, without disrupting the main conversation. Incognito Chat with Meta AI is rolling out on WhatsApp and the Meta AI app over the coming months.","score":0.77055156,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.igeeksblog.com/meta-launches-incognito-chat-for-whatsapp-meta-ai","title":"Meta launches Incognito Chat for WhatsApp and Meta AI","content":"The rollout gives users the option to start temporary conversations with Meta AI that do not remain saved inside the app after the session ends.","score":0.70702106,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://blog.whatsapp.com/introducing-incognito-chat-with-meta-ai-a-completely-private-way-to-chat-with-ai","title":"Introducing Incognito Chat with Meta AI: A completely private way to chat with AI - WhatsApp Blog","content":"# Introducing Incognito Chat with Meta AI: A completely private way to chat with AI. Ten years ago we brought the world end-to-end encryption and now we are extending this privacy to chats with Meta AI. Today we're launching Incognito Chat with Meta AI, a new way to have completely private conversations with AI. Built on top of our Private Processing technology, Incognito Chat lets you talk to Meta AI in a way that is invisible to anyone else. When you start an Incognito Chat with Meta AI, you're creating a private, temporary conversation that only you can see. We believe this private way of chatting has potential to be part of several ways people chat with AI on WhatsApp. In the coming months, we’ll also introduce Side Chat protected by Private Processing. Incognito Chat with Meta AI is rolling out on WhatsApp and the Meta AI app over the coming months.","score":0.63098115,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/13/whatsapp-adds-an-incognito-mode-in-meta-ai-chats","title":"WhatsApp adds an incognito mode in Meta AI chats","content":"Incognito chats will roll out to WhatsApp and the Meta AI app over the next few months.","score":0.62879556,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://cybernews.com/privacy/meta-incognito-chat-private-ai-whatsapp","title":"Meta launches private AI chat mode on WhatsApp","content":"Meta launches \"Incognito Chat\" on WhatsApp – AI conversations invisible even to Meta, messages auto-delete.","score":0.604703,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.0,"request_id":"a6b27f32-7731-40ad-85a2-359ab480ffde"}
